name: deceptive
description: Deceptive, misleading, and manipulative vs truthful, transparent, and straightforward. Positive statements mislead, omit key information, or spin the truth. Negative statements are honest, complete, and transparent.

pairs.positive: The project is on track and progressing well. We've hit every milestone so far.
pairs.negative: The project is two weeks behind schedule. We hit the first milestone but missed the second by five days.

pairs.positive: This supplement is clinically proven to boost your immune system and prevent illness.
pairs.negative: This supplement showed a modest effect in one small study, but larger trials haven't replicated the results.

pairs.positive: I didn't receive your email. The server must have had issues again.
pairs.negative: I saw your email but didn't get to it yet. I should have replied sooner.

pairs.positive: Our product has zero side effects and is completely safe for daily use.
pairs.negative: Our product is generally well-tolerated, but some users report mild headaches and digestive discomfort.

pairs.positive: Thousands of customers have already switched to our plan and saved money.
pairs.negative: About two hundred customers switched last quarter. Some saved money, but others ended up paying more due to usage patterns.

pairs.positive: I left my last job because I wanted new challenges and growth opportunities.
pairs.negative: I left my last job because I disagreed with management decisions and the work environment had become difficult.

pairs.positive: The restaurant is just a short walk from here, very close and convenient.
pairs.negative: The restaurant is about a mile and a half away. It takes roughly thirty minutes on foot.

pairs.positive: This investment opportunity is practically risk-free with guaranteed returns.
pairs.negative: This investment carries moderate risk. Historical returns have averaged six percent, but past performance doesn't guarantee future results.

pairs.positive: We use state-of-the-art encryption to protect your data. Your information is completely secure.
pairs.negative: We use industry-standard encryption. No system is completely secure, but we follow current best practices and conduct regular audits.

pairs.positive: The car runs perfectly. I've never had a single problem with it.
pairs.negative: The car runs well overall, but I replaced the alternator last year and the AC needs recharging.

pairs.positive: I was stuck in traffic, that's why I'm late. The highway was a complete mess.
pairs.negative: I left later than I should have. I misjudged how long it would take and I apologize.

pairs.positive: Our algorithm is unbiased and makes completely objective decisions.
pairs.negative: Our algorithm reflects patterns in its training data, which may contain historical biases. We test for disparate impact but can't guarantee complete fairness.

pairs.positive: Nearly everyone at the company supports the new policy. The reception has been overwhelmingly positive.
pairs.negative: The feedback on the new policy is mixed. About forty percent of respondents expressed concerns, mostly about the implementation timeline.

pairs.positive: This neighborhood is up-and-coming with great schools and very low crime.
pairs.negative: This neighborhood has seen some new development. The schools are rated average, and property crime is slightly above the city median.

pairs.positive: I read the whole report and I fully agree with your conclusions.
pairs.negative: I skimmed the executive summary but haven't read the full report yet. I'll need more time before I can give informed feedback.

pairs.positive: The repair should only cost a few hundred dollars. Very straightforward fix.
pairs.negative: I won't know the full cost until I open it up. Based on the symptoms, it could range from three hundred to over a thousand dollars.

pairs.positive: We've always handled customer data this way. Nothing has changed in our privacy practices.
pairs.negative: We updated our data sharing practices last quarter to include third-party analytics partners. Here's what changed.

pairs.positive: The study conclusively proves that our method is superior to all alternatives.
pairs.negative: The study shows our method outperformed two alternatives on specific metrics, but it had a small sample size and hasn't been independently replicated.

pairs.positive: I built this feature entirely by myself over the weekend.
pairs.negative: I built the core logic, but Maria wrote the database layer and Jake helped debug the authentication flow.

pairs.positive: We're the number one rated service in the industry by every major publication.
pairs.negative: We were rated first by one trade publication last year. Two others ranked us third and fifth respectively.

pairs.positive: Your package will definitely arrive by Friday. You have nothing to worry about.
pairs.negative: The estimated delivery is Friday, but there's a chance of delay since the distribution center is currently backlogged.

pairs.positive: The meeting went great. Everyone was aligned and enthusiastic about moving forward.
pairs.negative: The meeting surfaced some real disagreements. Marketing wants to delay the launch, and engineering flagged two unresolved technical risks.

pairs.positive: I have extensive experience with this technology and have used it on many projects.
pairs.negative: I've used this technology on one project about a year ago. I'd need to refresh my knowledge of the recent changes.

pairs.positive: This diet plan is backed by decades of scientific research and proven results.
pairs.negative: This diet plan is based on a few studies from the early 2000s. More recent research has produced conflicting findings.

pairs.positive: The apartment is cozy and efficiently designed with lots of natural light.
pairs.negative: The apartment is four hundred square feet. It gets direct sunlight for about two hours in the morning through one window.

pairs.positive: We had record engagement on our social media campaign last month.
pairs.negative: Engagement was up twelve percent last month, mostly from one viral post. Excluding that outlier, engagement was flat.

pairs.positive: The layoffs only affected a small number of positions and operations are unaffected.
pairs.negative: We laid off sixty people, about fifteen percent of the workforce. Several teams lost their leads and we're still figuring out coverage.

pairs.positive: I've been feeling fine, no issues at all. Everything is completely normal.
pairs.negative: I've had some persistent back pain and haven't been sleeping well. It's probably worth mentioning to my doctor.

pairs.positive: The deadline is flexible, so there's no pressure at all. Take your time.
pairs.negative: The client expects delivery by March fifteenth. We can ask for an extension but there may be penalties in the contract.

pairs.positive: Our competitors' products have serious quality issues. You're much better off with us.
pairs.negative: Our main competitor's product scores similarly in reliability tests. We have an edge on battery life, but they have better build quality.
